dialog.stepLabel: Changli: "How rude. This is not how we greet people here...."

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: How rude. This is not how we greet people here.

items.speaker: Changli
items.text: Allow me to demonstrate the proper etiquette.

dialog.stepLabel: Xinyi: "The Mianloong Chamber is open now. You can proceed inside...."

items.text: Xinyi places the Cipher Key onto the Keyforge.

items.speaker: Xinyi
items.text: The Mianloong Chamber is open now. You can proceed inside.

items.speaker: Xinyi
items.text: Before you go, there's something important I need to tell you.

options.text: About how the Fractsidus imprisoned your Sentinel?

items.speaker: Xinyi
items.text: Changli was right. They used the Court of Savantae's research to trap our Sentinel in its resting chamber.

items.speaker: Xinyi
items.text: They used the Chronosorters.

items.speaker: Xinyi
items.text: Our captured Artificer revealed that the Fractsidus sent a death squad to invade Mt. Firmament. They had a two-fold plan…

items.speaker: Xinyi
items.text: First, to place the Chronosorter in the Mianloong Chamber while it was still operational; and second, to lure the Sentinel back to Mt. Firmament.

items.speaker: Xinyi
items.text: Although their death squad was no match for the Sentinel, by forcing its hand, the powerful Resonance Ability of the Sentinel would clash with the energy of the Chronosorter. This would ultimately cause harm to itself.

options.text: Would that really make any difference?
How could some Chronosorters trap the Sentinel?

items.speaker: Xinyi
items.text: What if the Fractsidus modified those Chronosorters?

items.speaker: Xinyi
items.text: A whole bunch of them, pushed to their limits, all working together to deliver one massive blow.

items.speaker: Xinyi
items.text: But not even that was enough to take down the Sentinel.

items.speaker: Xinyi
items.text: After the first hit, they set up modified Flare Crests in the Mianloong Chamber to form a special force field along with those Chronosorters.

items.speaker: Xinyi
items.text: It prevented the Sentinel from replenishing energy and eventually restricted its movement and perception.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: So... We must free the Sentinel from that force field first.

items.speaker: Xinyi
items.text: ...It would be a task more complicated than it sounds.

items.speaker: Xinyi
items.text: The people of Hongzhen have lived with the Sentinel for generations. We can usually tell if it's in good shape or not.

items.speaker: Xinyi
items.text: But now, the Fractsidus want to capture the Sentinel... They won't just stop at Mt. Firmament. Madam Magistrate, I'm sure you didn't come here just for the Sentinel...

items.speaker: Xinyi
items.text: Please tell us what you know, Madam Magistrate.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Yes, I will tell you everything.
Jinhsi updates Xinyi on her findings at Truthseeker's Pass and shares her theory about the situation. She then outlines her current plans.

items.speaker: Xinyi
items.text: So the Sentinel is actually injured, and it's been getting worse... The Fractsidus attacked while it hasn't healed yet. Their plans are devious as always.

items.speaker: Xinyi
items.text: Madam Magistrate, you've already laid out this plan so far.

items.speaker: Xinyi
items.text: It's always a challenge to decipher the Sentinel's intentions, but there were many theories about it in City Hall at the time. I couldn't fathom why it went through such great lengths to retrieve you from Mt. Firmament and raise you within our walls.

items.speaker: Xinyi
items.text: But now that I reflect on it, perhaps the Sentinel saw in you the potential to one day restore the Temporal Program and ensure the survival of Jinzhou's inhabitants.

items.speaker: Xinyi
items.text: I just never thought.. You'd be willing to follow through with that prophecy…

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: It was here on this very mountain that I first encountered the Sentinel.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Back then, I was too young to remember anything. Even the image of Mt. Firmament has slipped from my mind.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: But this time... As soon as I stood at the base of Mt. Firmament, I felt a wave of recognition wash over me. Memories long buried resurfaced with sudden clarity.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Lady Xinyi... I was born with my life, my everything connected to our Sentinel.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: But my duty as its Appointed Resonator is not the only reason for my decision.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: ...I'm following the heart of my younger self before I became Jinhsi: The girl who used to laugh with pure joy as she felt the snow from Mt. Firmament on her face.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I am a seed, born on Mt. Firmament, carried by the wind to every corner of Jinzhou. But now, I have returned to my place of origin.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: It's time for me to take root and grow into something greater...

items.speaker: Xinyi
items.text: Sigh... No matter what happens or what choices you make, please remember: the people of Hongzhen will always have your back.

items.speaker: Xinyi
items.text: Mt. Firmament has been stagnant for eternity. Perhaps a sudden crack of lightning is what we need to break through the fog of uncertainty that has lingered over us for far too long.

dialog.stepLabel: Jinhsi: "I can feel the Sentinel's presence inside, but it's not resp..."

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I can feel the Sentinel's presence inside, but it's not responding...

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: ...This must be the Mianloong Chamber.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: We should now help the Sentinel break free from the Flare Crest's binds.

options.text: The water surface isn't moving at all.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Chronosorters nearby may have frozen this body of water in time, or it could've been caused by the Temporal Disruptions here.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Either way, we can use it to our advantage... We can walk over the water now.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: ...We are too far away to see what's going on inside.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: {PlayerName}, let's go. I still need more information to determine what we should do next.
